response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the provided reference for Suou Patra's song 'Omoide Rocket'. Discarded extra lyrics from the reference JSON as the video segment transitions from the performance to an MC talk segment at 02:00. Timing is strictly tied to the vocal activity, ensuring no text is shown during instrumental breaks or pauses. The on-screen text in the outro has been transcribed and translated as secondary priority text.

subtitles.original: クソゲーなんて この世にない
subtitles.english: There's no such thing as a trash game in this world.

subtitles.original: クリアして笑ってやるのさ
subtitles.english: I'll clear it and laugh.

subtitles.original: みんな笑え
subtitles.english: Everyone laugh!

subtitles.original: みんな踊れ
subtitles.english: Everyone dance!

subtitles.original: きっと痛み我慢してるんだろう
subtitles.english: You're probably enduring some pain, right?

subtitles.original: ダサいのにね
subtitles.english: Even though it's uncool,

subtitles.original: うらやましい
subtitles.english: it's enviable.

subtitles.original: そんな風に生きてみたいだろ
subtitles.english: You want to live like that, don't you?

subtitles.original: 気づいたらみんな みんな
subtitles.english: Before you know it, everyone,

subtitles.original: 呼びかけたりしてる
subtitles.english: is calling out to each other.

subtitles.original: カミゲー ムリゲー クソゲー
subtitles.english: God games, impossible games, trash games,

subtitles.original: 好奇心は止められない
subtitles.english: curiosity can't be stopped!

subtitles.original: 良いことも悪いことも
subtitles.english: Both the good things and the bad,

subtitles.original: 君の人生の味方になーれ
subtitles.english: let them become allies in your life!

subtitles.original: みんな起きろ
subtitles.english: Everyone, wake up!

subtitles.original: みんな叫べ
subtitles.english: Everyone, shout!

subtitles.original: ゲームオーバー またリトライすればいい
subtitles.english: Game over? Just retry again!

subtitles.original: あきらめられない ここで
subtitles.english: I can't give up here,

subtitles.original: ハッピーエンドに
subtitles.english: for a happy ending!

subtitles.original: みんな笑え
subtitles.english: Everyone laugh!

subtitles.original: みんな踊れ
subtitles.english: Everyone dance!

subtitles.original: 勇気だけが武器じゃないように
subtitles.english: So that courage isn't your only weapon.

subtitles.original: あどけない服 走る心
subtitles.english: Innocent clothes, a racing heart,

subtitles.original: 悲しいときには
subtitles.english: when you're sad,

subtitles.original: 泣けばいいんだよ
subtitles.english: it's okay to cry.

subtitles.original: なーにをコソコソしてるんですか？
subtitles.english: What are you whispering about?

subtitles.original: もう 起こしてもいいかな？
subtitles.english: Is it okay if I wake you up now?

subtitles.original: いやいや 想いを込めたもの
subtitles.english: No, no, everything I've put my feelings into,

subtitles.original: すべてを見届けたい
subtitles.english: I want to see it through to the end.

subtitles.original: そんな行方が見たいだけ
subtitles.english: I just want to see how it turns out.

subtitles.original: みんなみんな不安なんだ
subtitles.english: Everyone, everyone is anxious.

subtitles.original: 世の中にね 自分のこと
subtitles.english: In this world, I wonder if there's someone

subtitles.original: 許してくれる人がいるのかな
subtitles.english: who will forgive me for who I am.

subtitles.original: 挑戦したら勇者
subtitles.english: If you try, you're a hero.

subtitles.original: みんな起きろ
subtitles.english: Everyone, wake up!

subtitles.original: みんな叫べ
subtitles.english: Everyone, shout!

subtitles.original: 涙があって 振り切ったけれども
subtitles.english: Even though there were tears and I shook them off,

subtitles.original: クソゲーなんて この世にない
subtitles.english: there's no such thing as a trash game in this world.

subtitles.original: クリアして見せて 笑ってやるんだ
subtitles.english: I'll show you I can clear it and laugh!

subtitles.original: はーい、お疲れ様でしたー！
subtitles.english: Okay, thank you for your hard work!

subtitles.original: ね、カニカマもいてくれたの？ どうもお疲れ様でした。
subtitles.english: Oh, Kanikama was here too? Thanks for the help.

subtitles.original: 今日はね、あ、みんな！みんな！みんな！待ってたよー。
subtitles.english: Today, oh everyone! Everyone! I was waiting for you!

subtitles.original: 今日はね、あの、なんと前回と同じステージと思いつつ、ちょっと変化があるんですよ。
subtitles.english: Today, well, it looks like the same stage as last time, but there's a little change.

subtitles.original: ステージの紹介をしたいなーって思います。まだまだあるよ。
subtitles.english: I'd like to introduce the stage. There's more!

subtitles.original: 見て見て見て。これ、なんと前回よりもプレゼントが増えています。
subtitles.english: Look, look! There are even more presents than last time.

subtitles.original: どどーん。ほらほら、何が入っているのかなっていうね、形になってるのと。
subtitles.english: Ta-da! See, they're set up like 'I wonder what's inside?'

subtitles.original: あと、ここ！カニカマがちょっと変化してます。わかるでしょうか。
subtitles.english: And here! Kanikama has changed a bit. Can you tell?

subtitles.original: えー、間違い探しじゃないですけど、微妙に変わっております。
subtitles.english: It's not exactly 'spot the difference,' but it's slightly changed.

subtitles.original: なんと、カニカマが増えています！ 気づいた？気づいたかな？
subtitles.english: Surprisingly, the number of Kanikama has increased! Did you notice?

subtitles.original: あとステージ全体はこうなってます。おおー、豪華！
subtitles.english: And the whole stage looks like this. Wow, so luxurious!

subtitles.original: すごいよねー。キラキラ度も増しております。みんなも応援ありがとう。
subtitles.english: It's amazing, isn't it? The sparkle level has also increased. Thanks for the support, everyone.

subtitles.original: それからね、で、でっかいね、サムネイル。かわいい！
subtitles.english: And then, there's the giant thumbnail. So cute!

subtitles.original: 同じ、同じポーズ。なんか違うような気がするけど、あ、同じポーズ。ね、すごい豪華に描いてもらいました。
subtitles.english: The same pose! I feel like it's different, but oh, it's the same pose. It was drawn so beautifully.

subtitles.original: それから、あーい！シロパトー！
subtitles.english: And next, hello! Shiropato!

subtitles.original: はいはいはい。ちょうどね、はい。あんまりね、出番がなかったシロパトちゃんです。
subtitles.english: Yes, yes. This is Shiropato, who didn't get much screen time today.

subtitles.original: ね、今日はね、1曲目歌ってくれてどうもありがとうね、シロパト。
subtitles.english: Hey, Shiropato, thanks a lot for singing the first song with me today.

subtitles.original: ね、みんなは白と黒、どっちのパトラが好き？
subtitles.english: So, everyone, do you like the white or black Patra better?

subtitles.original: おっ、あ、ね。シロパトちゃんのほうがちょっとね、柔らかいの。ほら、跳ねて跳ねて。
subtitles.english: Oh, see? Shiropato is a bit softer. Look, she's bouncing!

subtitles.original: そうなの。やっぱパトはね、あの鉄壁のベルトが巻いてあるからね。シロパトちゃんのほうが柔らかいんですよ。
subtitles.english: That's right. After all, I have my 'ironclad' belt on. Shiropato is much softer.

subtitles.original: ほらほら、よく見て見て. 二人のツーショット。みんな、どっちが好きかな？ どっちも好き？
subtitles.english: Look closely! A two-shot of us. I wonder which one you like? Or both?

subtitles.original: あ、ありがとうございます。あ、ぜひ高評価、チャンネル登録もぜひよろしくお願いいたします。
subtitles.english: Ah, thank you. And please remember to like and subscribe!

subtitles.original: みんな、本当に今日はありがとう。これからもよろしくね。バイバーイ！
subtitles.english: Everyone, thank you so much for today. Please keep supporting me. Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: 生誕祭ライブ終わりました！
subtitles.english: The birthday concert has ended!

subtitles.original: つたない歌と豪華なステージではしゃぐパトが今年もできたのはあなたのおかげです。
subtitles.english: It's thanks to you that Patra could have fun again this year with my clumsy singing and a grand stage.

subtitles.original: 今日もこの世界に生きててくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you for living in this world today too!

subtitles.original: パトは今こうしていることが一番楽しいです。
subtitles.english: Doing this right now is what I enjoy the most.

subtitles.original: それはきっと世界で一番幸せなことです。　周防パトラ
subtitles.english: That is surely the happiest thing in the world. - Suou Patra
